title: Sunrise surf session
description: A small-group surf lesson on the beaches of Biarritz with warm-up drills, ocean safety tips, and time in the water with a local instructor.
meetingPoint: Cote des Basques beach hut, Biarritz
cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before start

title: French Riviera boat day
description: Cruise along the coastline of Nice, swim in clear coves, and enjoy a laid-back day on the water with views of the old town and surrounding cliffs.
cancellation: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure

title: Calanques sailing escape

description: A guided stroll through Montmartre's stairways, terraces, and hidden corners with local stories and ideal stops for memorable city photos.

title: French pastry atelier
description: Learn to prepare classic Parisian pastries in a bright studio kitchen, with hands-on guidance and tasting at the end of the class.
